name: Cheesecake- Pike
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine crust ingredients in a bowl and press into the bottom and sides of a buttered 25 cm springform pan. Bake for 5 minutes, then cool completely.
2. Beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add sugar and blend well. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition. Stir in lemon rind and vanilla. Pour mixture into the baked crust and bake for 35 minutes.
3. In another bowl, mix topping ingredients. Spread over cheesecake and return to oven. Bake for 10-12 minutes until lightly browned. Remove from oven.
4. Prepare glaze by mixing dry ingredients, then add liquid glaze ingredients. Cook over low heat until thickened. Stir in butter and let cool slightly before spreading evenly over the cake.
This recipe is a faithful adaptation of the original text, maintaining clarity and consistency while adhering to the specified formatting rules.
